description.value: Benefit: As a move action, choose a target you can accurately perceive and make a Sense Motive check opposed by the target's Bluff check result. If you succeed, the GM tells you the target's attack and defense bonus relative to yours (lower, higher, or equal). In cases of a 5-point or greater difference, the GM may indicate the difference is considerable.
